package_name: 独立 Focus 对焦系统 UI 方案与接入前置

focus_semantics.tap_focus: Tap preview to set focus and metering point.
focus_semantics.mf: Manual focus state driven by lensPosition, not implemented as new UI in this package.
focus_semantics.lock: AE/AF Lock state entered by long press.

A_viewfinder_edge_capsule.description: Small AF / MF / LOCK capsule at the viewfinder edge.
A_viewfinder_edge_capsule.reason: Focus is tied to the viewfinder subject and should not return to the bottom five-parameter bar.

B_top_toolbar_entry.description: Focus status entry in the top toolbar.
B_top_toolbar_entry.reason: Good for status but too far from thumb-level manual focus interaction.

C_contextual_focus_marker_panel.description: Small panel near the tap-focus marker.
C_contextual_focus_marker_panel.reason: Strong context but too much occlusion and placement complexity for the first implementation.

D_bottom_focus_panel.description: Independent bottom low-position Focus panel triggered by the Focus capsule.
D_bottom_focus_panel.reason: Useful for a later MF control while keeping Focus outside EV / WB / TINT / ISO / S.

recommended_plan.summary: Use a viewfinder-edge Focus status capsule as the entry, then expand an independent low-position Focus panel later.
recommended_plan.next_package: R56 独立 Focus 状态胶囊 + AF / MF / LOCK 最小 UI 骨架
next_package_should_do: Add a small Focus status capsule at the viewfinder edge.
Show AF / MF / LOCK based on current runtime states.
Open a lightweight Focus panel skeleton on capsule tap.
Close five-parameter, lens, and More overlays when Focus panel opens.
Close Focus panel on preview tap.
next_package_should_not_do: Do not add Manual Focus ruler.
Do not add new lensPosition writes.
Do not change long-press AE/AF Lock.
Do not return Focus to the bottom five-parameter bar.

interaction_boundaries.with_five_parameter_console: Mutually exclusive. Focus panel closes EV / WB / TINT / ISO / S inline controls and vice versa.
interaction_boundaries.with_lens_zoom_ruler: Mutually exclusive. Lens writes zoom only; Focus writes focus/lensPosition only in future packages.
interaction_boundaries.with_more_panel: Mutually exclusive. More panel persistent interaction remains unchanged.
interaction_boundaries.with_preview_tap: If a panel is open, first tap closes the panel; tap focus runs after the panel is closed.
interaction_boundaries.with_long_press: Long press remains AE/AF Lock and should not be intercepted by Focus UI.
interaction_boundaries.with_pinch_zoom: Pinch remains zoom and must not be confused with future MF adjustment.

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

device_run.reason: This package is documentation and preflight only.

known_risks: The future Focus capsule location must be validated on device to avoid covering product subjects.
MF and AE/AF Lock already have runtime guard rules; the future UI must not make those states appear simultaneously editable.
The existing focus parameter state mapping remains in CaptureScreen for reference but must not be reconnected to the bottom five-parameter bar.
